---
title: "Posts"
subtitle: "Shorter notes, explanations and observations arising from ongoing research and professional practice."
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
sidebar: false
listing:
  id: posts_all
  contents: posts
  page-size: 15
  sort: "date-modified desc"
  type: grid
  fields: [image, title, subtitle, reading-time, categories, description, author, date, date-modified]
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  categories: true
  max-description-length: 500
---

::: {#posts_all}
:::
